series_metadata.series_title: Child Care Training Contracts/Grants and Deliverables
series_metadata.series_description: Contracts and Grants with resource and referral agencies for child care training. Files include copies of the contracts, grants and Requests for Proposal (RFP’s), contractor proposals, award letters, deliverables and related supporting documentation. These are 2 year contracts with (e.g. Ohio Education Television Systems, Ohio Department of Education and Health, Children’s Resources USA, Inc., and First Teacher) for training in quality child care services, school readiness, etc. Note: These files contain much of the supporting documentation that is not scheduled with the original ODJFS contracts, grants and RFP’s in Contract Administration.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 1 year in office beyond closing of the contract or grant, then review by State Archives prior to disposition. ; Electronic: Retain 1 year in office beyond closing of the contract or grant, then review by State Archives prior to disposition., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
